channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 9cf8853f-1e61-4999-915d-3e018bfc8a71
Display name: Confidential Ledger Contributor
Description: Allows full management of Confidential Ledger resources, including create, read, update, delete, backup and private endpoint connection management.
Link: https://management.azure.com/9cf8853f-1e61-4999-915d-3e018bfc8a71?api-version=2022-04-01
